name: create_order
description: Create a new order in Razorpay. Orders are the starting point of the payment flow -- you create an order with an amount and currency, then use the order ID on the client side to collect payment. The order tracks the payment status and ensures the correct amount is collected. Amount is specified in the smallest currency unit (paise for INR).

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The order amount in the smallest currency unit (e.g. paise for INR, so 50000 = INR 500.00).

parameters.name: receipt
parameters.description: Your internal order receipt or reference number. Max 40 characters.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Key-value pairs for additional information. Max 15 keys, each value max 256 characters.

parameters.name: partial_payment
parameters.description: Whether the customer can make a partial payment. Default false.
